name: ScanIta.org
warnings: getDetails loads chapters from a SEPARATE page: it reads a `.container-fluid button.w-100` data-path attribute, extracts the manga id between `/manga/` and `/books`, then GETs https://{domain}/manga/{id}/books to parse the chapter list. The base ScanParser (and thus ScanEngine) reads chapters inline from the details page, so this source will yield NO chapters until a two-step-chapters knob is added. List/pages/search are unaffected.

name: MangaBr
warnings: Marked @Broken in kotatsu (source non-functional at snapshot time). Pure-config; no method overrides. Include only after re-verifying the site is live.

name: MangaTerra
brokenReason: dead upstream, no verified successor (2026-07 recovery sweep)

name: MangaFr
warnings: Overrides listUrl=/series and disables tags (getFilterOptions returns empty; details set tags empty) — both datafied via config.listUrl + config.discoverTags=false. Its getDetails is otherwise the base logic; minor divergence (uses selectFirstOrThrow on chapter h5 vs base selectFirst) is negligible and intentionally NOT reproduced.
